name: 12-invalid-single-label-extension
description: Capability id `openai:tool:call` uses a single-label namespace (`openai:`) that is not in the v0.1 adapter registry. Schema rejects per schema-rule: single-label namespaces outside the registry (mcp is the only one in v0.1) are reserved and invalid until formally registered.
notes: Prevents emitter squatting on high-value short-form namespaces like openai:, langchain:, docker:. A vendor needing this capability today must use reverse-DNS (com.openai.mcp:tool:call, com.vendor.openai:tool:call).
